transcript: Speaker A (Human): तू केव्हा येणार? [When are you coming?] Speaker B (AI): I will return back on Monday. Speaker A (Human): Return back नाही. Return म्हणजेच परत येणं. Return आणि back दोन्ही एकत्र म्हणजे परत परत का येतोयस? Just say, "I will return on Monday." [Not "return back". Return means coming back. Return and back together means why are you coming back again and again? Just say, "I will return on Monday."] Speaker B (AI): Ohh... ठीक आहे ठीक आहे. मला English नीट येत नाही. [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English well.] Speaker A (Human): काही problem नाही. AI teachers try केलं का? [No problem. Have you tried AI teachers?] Speaker B (AI): ते महाग असतील ना? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (Human): अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा ७ पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून १ कोटी लोक MySivi वर इंग्लिश प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B (AI): पण वेळच मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A (Human): रोज फक्त १५-२० मिनिटे प्रॅक्टिस पुरेशी आहे अगदी confident व्हायला. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough to become very confident.] Speaker B (AI): Wow! कसं join करू? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker A (Human): हा install चा button दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. Sign up करा आणि प्रॅक्टिस start करा. फक्त १५ दिवसांत तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. चला सुरू करा. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Let's start.]
on_screen_text: "तू केव्हा येणार" [When are you coming] "back on Monday" "Return back नाही" [Not Return back] "Return म्हणजेच" [Return means] "परत येणं" [coming back] "Return आणि back" [Return and back] "दोन्ही एकत्र" [both together] "परत परत का येतोयस" [why are you coming again and again] "Just say" "I will return on Monday" "Ohh... ठीक आहे ठीक आहे" [Ohh... okay okay] "मला English नीट" [I don't know English] "येत नाही" [well] "काही problem नाही" [No problem] "AI teachers" "try केलं का" [did you try] "ते महाग असतील ना" [they must be expensive, right] "अजिबात नाही" [Not at all] "Normal English" "classes पेक्षा" [than classes] "7 पट स्वस्त आहे" [7 times cheaper] "म्हणून 1 कोटी" [That's why 1 crore] "लोक MySivi वर" [people on MySivi] "इंग्लिश प्रॅक्टिस" [English practice] "करत आहेत" [are doing] "पर वेळच मिळत नाही" [But don't get time] "रोज फक्त 15-20" [Daily only 15-20] "minute practice" "पुरेशी आहे" [is enough] "अगदी confident" [very confident] "व्हायला" [to become] "Wow" "कसं join करू" [How to join] "हा install चा" [This install] "button दाबा आणि" [button press and] "MySivi app install" "Sign up करा आणि" [Sign up and] "practice करा" [practice] "फक्त 15 दिवसांत" [In just 15 days] "तुम्हाला improvement" [you improvement] "दिसायला लागेल" [will start seeing] "चला" [Let's] "सुरू करा" [start]
summary: A woman corrects an AI avatar's English grammar during a simulated video call. She then recommends the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient way to practice English with AI teachers. The ad concludes with a call-to-action to install the app for visible improvement in 15 days.
